Entries.name: Kite Festival
Entries.Set-Up_additionalCharacters: Wizard 36 2 down/Willy 20 6 left/Robin 30 9 down/Demetrius 31 9 down/Maru 32 10 left/Jodi 40 10 down/Kent 41 10 down/Sam 42 12 left/Vincent 41 13 left/Alex 18 21 left/Sebastian 20 20 down/Abigail 21 21 left/Harvey 33 30 left/Caroline 40 38 down/Marnie 39 39 right/Shane 42 41 right/Jas 41 42 down/Evelyn 54 18 down/George 55 18 down/Marlon 59 18 down/Leo 56 25 down/Linus 57 25 down/Clint 61 23 right/Lewis 82 9 down/Leah 74 27 right/Elliot 75 26 down/Gus 94 16 down/Pam 95 17 left/Penny 96 19 down/Emily 88 32 down/Haley 87 33 right/Pierre 98 5 down/{{ModId}}_EdwinPayne 34 5 down/{{ModId}}_CharlesRowland 35 5 down/{{ModId}}_CrystalPalace 48 35 right/{{ModId}}_NikoSasaki? 48 36 right/{{ModId}}_MontyFinch 66 19 down/{{ModId}}_JennyButcher 94 20 down/{{ModId}}_EstherFinch 79 9 down/{{ModId}}_CatKing 74 20 down/Wem.Bundle.Tilly? 76 32 right/Wem.Clark.Clark? 78 32 left
Entries.startedMessage: The Kite Festival has begun at the lighthouse.
Entries.Abigail: There's a trick to keeping a kite in the air...#$e#Maybe I'll share my secrets with you. After I win this year's contest, of course.
Entries.Robin: Honey, maybe we should let Maru fly it with her gut instinct instead?
Entries.Demetrius: If we calculate the velocity of the wind to be 7 m/s, and the angle of the force on the string to be 54 degrees...
Entries.Maru: If I know all the physics behind flying a kite, why isn't it easier to keep it in the air?
Entries.Sebastian: Heh. Out here has the best winds, but most people are too scared of high tide.
Entries.Linus: I made my kite out of sticks I foraged in the woods and canvas I wove myself out of fiber.#$e$It's amazing what kind of materials you can find in nature if you just know where to look.
Entries.Caroline: I don't know who was looking forward to the Kite Festival more, Abby or Pierre!#$e#Personally, I love any opportunity to mingle with friends.
Entries.Alex: It takes strength, speed, and agility to fly a kite as well as this.#$e#Good thing I've been working out so much.
Entries.George: This wind chills me right to the bone... I guess the kids are having fun, though.
Entries.Evelyn: My George won the kite contest a few times when we first started dating!#$b#He always gifted me the prize, or used his winnings to take me out.#$e#Young love...
Entries.Lewis: Ready for the kite-flying contest, @?#$e#You know, back in my day, I was something of an ace at flying a kite.$h#$e#These bones are too old to be running around like that now, though.$h
Entries.Clint: Do you think Emily would be impressed by my kite-flying skills?#$e#What am I even saying...
Entries.Penny: The kite festival is a good opportunity for the kids to learn about wind, weather, that sort of thing.
Entries.Pam: Even when Penny was little, she didn't want to fly a kite with the rest of the kids.#$e#I think she was convinced she would fly away!$h
Entries.Emily: It must be so freeing to be a kite, dancing in the breeze!#$e#Hey, do you think if we tied a rope around my waist...? Just kidding!$h
Entries.Haley: I hope this wind doesn't mess up my hair too much...#$b#I spent hours on it, wanting to look my best for the festival today.
Entries.Jodi: I hope Vincent's kite doesn't get stuck in a tree like last year... It took hours to get down and he was so disappointed.
Entries.Kent: When I squinted, the kites up there almost looked like warplanes high in the atmosphere. They don't have that classic engine roar, though.
Entries.Marlon: If you handle a kite as well as you handle a sword, you'll be stiff competition to beat!
Entries.Sam: Watch this! I bet I can make my kite do a triple flip.
Entries.Leah: Do you like the design I painted on my kite? It's an abstract representation of what spring means to me.
Entries.Shane: I helped Jas make her kite. What do you think?
Entries.Marnie: I had to get up early to take care of all the animals before the festival, but it's worth it to watch the kids have fun while catching up with friends!
Entries.Elliott: One year the wind almost whisked Lewis away. That image lingered with me, and it inspired a scene from my novel, actually!
Entries.Gus: Everyone is invited to the Saloon after the festivities! This wind goes right through you, so I always make a big pot of soup to warm everyone up.$h
Entries.Wizard: Flight is freedom. It's a shame the arcane knowledge to command the skies isn't known to everyone.
Entries.Harvey: Flying a kite can be excellent cardio!#$e#Although I usually spend more time untangling my kite's string than actually flying it...
Entries.Jas: Look! I can fly it all on my own!
Entries.Vincent: Do you like my kite? Sam helped me paint it. It's the Prairie King!
Entries.Willy: Flying a kite isn't all that different from fishing... It's all about the tension of the line.
Entries.{{ModId}}_CharlesRowland: Did I ever tell you about that case where Edwin turned into a kite? Ghosts don't weigh anything if they don't want to!#$action Spiderbuttons.BETAS_DialogueBox {{ModId}}_EdwinPayne "That is an exaggeration, Charles."#$b#Mate, you had a string wrapped around your waist and you were thirty feet in the air!$h
Entries.{{ModId}}_EdwinPayne: Charles wanted to recreate the Case of the Windy Weald, but I'm not eager to repeat the experience.$s#$b#I was not made for heights...
Entries.{{ModId}}_CrystalPalace: These gusts are so strong, I feel like I might fall off at any moment...$u
Entries.{{ModId}}_NikoSasaki: It must be nice to be a kite. Even when you fall down, the wind will pick you back up again.$h
Entries.{{ModId}}_CatKing: I'm happy here, thanks. The cats just wanted to steal some food and chase falling kites, and who am I to say no to a good time?
Entries.{{ModId}}_MontyFinch: Birds are much more graceful than any of these kites. It's all about catching the air currents.
Entries.{{ModId}}_JennyButcher: I made a killing on what I sold to Gus for today. I guess that's one thing that came out of this besides
Entries.{{ModId}}_EstherFinch: All these kids better watch out along these cliffs. All it takes is one... slip... oops!
Entries.Wem.Bundle.Tilly: I never flew kites as a kid and it's definitely showing.#$b#I think I'm doing alright though. It's up in the air, at least!
Entries.Wem.Clark.Clark: This might be my favourite festival. I flew kites through the fields all the time as a kid!
Entries.DolphINaF.Claire: I didn't think I'd want to fly one...#$b#Um. Pierre is selling kites, isn't he...?
Entries.DolphINaF.Susan_Susan: Gus asked me to help with the stew.#$b#Hehe, don't tell him I snuck a taste. It's still as delicious as ever.$1

Entries.Wem.Bundle.Tilly: Clark is such a show-off!#$b#...no he's not. I'm just competitive. But to be fair, I didn't grow up flying kites.

Entries.Wem.Clark.Clark: Tilly was complaining before I helped her get her kite up. She's all smiles now.#$e#Ahh, I feel like a kid again.
